685000000000000000000002 description: Concordia had security before it had ghosts. Cameras, guards, records, keys, people who looked the other way when paid. One of my old ledgers used to sit in that security room, until someone smart moved it before the wrong eyes found it. It is stashed now in a maintenance closet under the ramp on Ground Zero. Find it, recover it, and leave alive. Do not make a scene.
685000000000000000000002 note: Tony wants you to recover an old security ledger hidden in a maintenance closet under the ramp on Ground Zero.
685000000000000000000002 startedMessageT: Ground Zero. Maintenance closet under the ramp. My ledger is there now. Bring it back clean.
685000000000000000000002 successMessageT: Good. That ledger in the wrong hands would have made problems. You followed instructions and kept your head down. That matters.
685000000000000000000002 failMessageText: You either lost the trail or made too much noise following it.
685000000000000000000002 declinePlayerMe: Not going into Ground Zero for that yet.
685000000000000000000002 changeQuestMess: Tony wants the relocated ledger recovered quietly from Ground Zero.
685000000000000000000034: Locate the maintenance closet under the ramp on Ground Zero
685000000000000000000038: Survive and extract from Ground Zero
685000000000000000000003 description: The ledger you pulled from Concordia still has a useful name in it. One of my people left a sealed envelope in the Factory office building, second-floor locker room. You will move it to Ground Zero. Underground level, meat truck, far back. The man collecting it works for Prapor. He must not know where it came from or who carried it. Do not open it. Do not lose it. Do not bring it back to me.
685000000000000000000003 note: Move Tony's sealed envelope from the second-floor Factory office locker room to the far back of the underground meat truck on Ground Zero.
685000000000000000000003 startedMessageT: Factory office, second-floor locker room. Get the envelope. Then Ground Zero, underground meat truck, far back. Leave it there and walk away.
685000000000000000000003 successMessageT: Good. The envelope is where it needs to be. Prapor's man will remember what he owes and who still has the paper to prove it.
685000000000000000000003 failMessageText: You lost the envelope, lost the route, or lost your nerve.
685000000000000000000003 changeQuestMess: Tony wants the sealed envelope moved through an old courier route.
685000000000000000000314: Locate the sealed envelope in the Factory office locker room
685000000000000000000322: Stash Tony's sealed envelope in the Ground Zero meat truck
685000000000000000000327: Survive and extract from Ground Zero
685000000000000000000004 description: That envelope reached the right hands. Funny thing about frightened men, they remember things. One of Prapor's people just remembered an old Reserve parts cache that never made it onto the books. AK furniture, worn spares, magazines, cheap army scraps. I do not need you dragging metal across the base. Find the cache, mark it, and leave. My people will collect what Prapor forgot.
685000000000000000000004 note: Tony wants you to mark a forgotten army parts cache on Reserve so his people can recover it later.
685000000000000000000004 startedMessageT: Go to Reserve. Find the old army parts cache and mark it. Do not get greedy. Do not start opening crates.
685000000000000000000004 successMessageT: Good. The cache is marked. Prapor's man gave us the memory, you gave us the location, and now the leftovers belong to me.
685000000000000000000004 failMessageText: You either missed the cache or made too much noise near it. That is how useful things disappear.
685000000000000000000004 changeQuestMess: Tony wants the Reserve cache marked, not looted.
685000000000000000000414: Locate the forgotten army parts cache on Reserve
685000000000000000000415: Mark the army parts cache for Tony
